fa-arrow-up-long.appearanceId: single long vertical arrow pointing upward with full shaft

fa-arrow-up-right.appearanceId: diagonal arrow pointing up and to the right at 45 degrees
fa-arrow-up-right.functionalityId: opens link or expands to external view

fa-arrow-up-right-and-arrow-down-left-fr.appearanceId: two arrows diverging outward from center, one up-right and one down-left
fa-arrow-up-right-and-arrow-down-left-fr.functionalityId: expands or maximizes content to full screen
fa-arrow-up-right-and-arrow-down-left-fr.intentId: see content in a larger view

fa-arrow-up-right-dots.appearanceId: arrow pointing up-right with three dots arranged below-left along the shaft
fa-arrow-up-right-dots.functionalityId: exports or escalates items with pending status
fa-arrow-up-right-dots.intentId: send queued items to an external destination

fa-arrow-up-to-arc.appearanceId: upward arrow with tip meeting a curved arc line at the top
fa-arrow-up-to-arc.functionalityId: uploads content up to a limit or boundary
fa-arrow-up-to-arc.intentId: send data up to a defined threshold

fa-arrow-up-to-bracket.appearanceId: upward arrow with tip pointing into an open bracket at the top
fa-arrow-up-to-bracket.functionalityId: uploads or imports a file into a container
fa-arrow-up-to-bracket.intentId: push content into a designated slot or storage

fa-arrow-up-to-dotted-line.appearanceId: upward arrow with tip touching a horizontal dotted line above it
fa-arrow-up-to-dotted-line.functionalityId: moves or uploads content to a marked boundary
fa-arrow-up-to-dotted-line.intentId: position item at a defined upper limit

fa-arrow-up-z-a.appearanceId: upward arrow beside letters Z on top and A on bottom
fa-arrow-up-z-a.functionalityId: sorts list in reverse alphabetical Z to A order
fa-arrow-up-z-a.intentId: reorder items from Z down to A

fa-atom.appearanceId: central nucleus with three elliptical electron orbits
fa-atom.functionalityId: opens science or atomic structure reference

fa-award.appearanceId: circular medallion with a ribbon or banner below it
fa-award.functionalityId: grants or displays an achievement award

fa-axe.appearanceId: single-headed axe with curved blade and straight handle
fa-axe.functionalityId: equips or selects an axe tool in a game or app
fa-axe.intentId: chop, cut, or select a melee weapon

fa-axe-battle.appearanceId: double-headed battle axe with two curved blades and long handle
fa-axe-battle.functionalityId: equips or selects a battle axe weapon
fa-axe-battle.intentId: choose a heavy combat or fantasy weapon

fa-b.functionalityId: inserts or labels a B category or item
fa-b.intentId: mark or navigate to a B-labeled section

fa-backward.appearanceId: two triangles pointing left side by side forming a rewind symbol
fa-backward.functionalityId: rewinds or skips backward in media playback
fa-backward.intentId: go back to an earlier point in audio or video

fa-bacon.appearanceId: wavy horizontal strip with irregular wavy edges suggesting cooked bacon
fa-bacon.functionalityId: tags or filters food items as bacon
fa-bacon.intentId: indicate or select bacon as a food option

fa-bag-seedling.appearanceId: shopping bag shape with a small seedling sprout visible on the front
fa-bag-seedling.functionalityId: shops for or marks eco-friendly or plant products
fa-bag-seedling.intentId: buy or browse sustainable or gardening items

fa-bag-shopping.appearanceId: simple shopping bag outline with two loop handles at the top
fa-bag-shopping.functionalityId: opens shopping cart or bag view
fa-bag-shopping.intentId: review or proceed to purchase selected items

fa-ban.appearanceId: circle with diagonal line through center
fa-ban.functionalityId: blocks, bans, or disables a selected item
fa-ban.intentId: prevent access or mark something as forbidden

fa-bar-chart.appearanceId: three vertical bars of ascending heights arranged side by side
fa-bar-chart.functionalityId: opens analytics or chart data view
fa-bar-chart.intentId: visualize or compare data values over time

fa-bars.appearanceId: three horizontal parallel lines of equal length
fa-bars.intentId: access main menu or app navigation

fa-baseball.appearanceId: round ball with curved stitching seam lines on both sides
fa-baseball.intentId: browse or select baseball sports category

fa-baseball-bat-ball.appearanceId: round ball with a cylindrical bat crossing behind it diagonally
fa-baseball-bat-ball.functionalityId: opens baseball game stats or sports section
fa-baseball-bat-ball.intentId: view or interact with baseball game content

fa-basketball.appearanceId: round ball with curved seam lines forming panels across the surface
fa-basketball.intentId: browse or select basketball sports category

fa-basketball-hoop.appearanceId: circular hoop ring with a short net hanging below it
fa-basketball-hoop.functionalityId: opens basketball court or scoring section
fa-basketball-hoop.intentId: track basketball game or hoop activity

fa-battery-0.functionalityId: displays critically low or empty battery status
fa-battery-0.intentId: warn that device power is fully depleted

fa-battery-1.functionalityId: displays very low battery level indicator
fa-battery-1.intentId: alert user that battery charge is nearly gone

fa-battery-2.intentId: notify user that battery is running low

fa-battery-3.intentId: show that battery has moderate charge remaining

fa-battery-4.appearanceId: rectangular battery outline almost fully filled
fa-battery-4.intentId: confirm that battery is nearly fully charged

fa-battery-car.appearanceId: wide rectangular battery with a plus terminal on left and minus on right
fa-battery-car.functionalityId: opens car battery or vehicle power status
fa-battery-car.intentId: check or manage automotive battery health

fa-beer.appearanceId: mug silhouette with side handle and foam overflowing from the top
fa-beer.functionalityId: marks or filters beer or bar-related content
fa-beer.intentId: find or tag a beer or pub location

fa-beer-mug.appearanceId: tall mug with a side handle and horizontal ridges around the body
fa-beer-mug.functionalityId: marks or filters beer mug or brewery content
fa-beer-mug.intentId: select or browse beer and beverage options

fa-bell.appearanceId: rounded bell shape with small clapper at base
fa-bell.intentId: view or manage incoming alerts and messages

fa-bell-slash.appearanceId: rounded bell shape with a diagonal line crossing through it
fa-bell-slash.intentId: stop receiving alerts or silence reminders

fa-bicycle.appearanceId: side-view bicycle with two wheels and frame
fa-bicycle.functionalityId: filters or tags cycling or bike-related content
fa-bicycle.intentId: find cycling routes or bike-related options

fa-biking-mountain.appearanceId: side-view cyclist on a bicycle riding down a mountain slope
fa-biking-mountain.functionalityId: filters mountain biking trails or activities
fa-biking-mountain.intentId: find or log a mountain biking route

fa-bird.appearanceId: small bird silhouette with wings slightly spread in a perched or flying pose
fa-bird.functionalityId: tags bird-related content or nature category

fa-bold.appearanceId: thick uppercase letter B with wide strokes
fa-bold.functionalityId: applies bold formatting to selected text
fa-bold.intentId: make text heavier and more prominent

fa-book.appearanceId: closed book with visible spine on left and pages fanned on right
fa-book.functionalityId: opens a book, document, or reading section
fa-book.intentId: read or access written content or documentation

fa-book-arrow-right.appearanceId: closed book with a right-pointing arrow overlaid or attached to the right side
fa-book-arrow-right.functionalityId: exports or shares a book or document
fa-book-arrow-right.intentId: send or forward reading content to another location

fa-book-arrow-up.appearanceId: closed book with an upward-pointing arrow overlaid or rising from the top
fa-book-arrow-up.functionalityId: uploads or publishes a book or document
fa-book-arrow-up.intentId: submit or push written content to a repository

fa-book-circle-arrow-right.appearanceId: closed book inside a circle with a right-pointing arrow on the circle edge
fa-book-circle-arrow-right.functionalityId: shares or forwards a book within a circular workflow
fa-book-circle-arrow-right.intentId: pass along a document in a review or approval cycle

fa-book-circle-arrow-up.appearanceId: closed book inside a circle with an upward-pointing arrow on the circle edge
fa-book-circle-arrow-up.functionalityId: uploads or escalates a book within a circular workflow
fa-book-circle-arrow-up.intentId: promote or submit a document through a process

fa-book-open.appearanceId: open book with two pages spread flat and a central spine visible
fa-book-open.functionalityId: opens or displays reading or documentation content
fa-book-open.intentId: read or study an open document or guide

fa-bookmark.appearanceId: rectangular shape with V-notch cut from bottom
fa-bookmark.functionalityId: saves or bookmarks the current page or item
fa-bookmark.intentId: mark content to return to it later

fa-bow-arrow.appearanceId: curved bow with a horizontal arrow drawn across the string
fa-bow-arrow.functionalityId: selects or equips a bow and arrow weapon
fa-bow-arrow.intentId: choose a ranged weapon or archery activity

fa-bowl-chopsticks.appearanceId: round bowl with two chopsticks resting across the top rim
fa-bowl-chopsticks.functionalityId: tags or filters Asian food or dining content
fa-bowl-chopsticks.intentId: find or select Asian cuisine or restaurant options

fa-bowl-chopsticks-noodles.appearanceId: round bowl with wavy noodle strands inside and two chopsticks across the top
fa-bowl-chopsticks-noodles.functionalityId: tags or filters noodle or ramen dish content
